string.templatelib/Interpolation/express.name: expression
string.templatelib/Interpolation/express.description: For interpolations created by t-string literals, expression is the expression text found inside the curly brackets ({ & }), including any whitespace, excluding the curly brackets themselves, and ending before the first !, :, or = if any is present. For manually created interpolations, expression is the arbitrary string provided when constructing the interpolation instance. We recommend using valid Python expressions or the empty string for the expression field of manually created Interpolatio...
